verses.geez:
ወኮነ ፡ በዕለት ፡ እንተ ፡ ፈጸመ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ተኪሎታ ፡ ለደብተራ ፡ ወቀብአ ፡ ወቀደሳ ፡ ወለኵሉ ፡ ንዋያ ፡ ወምሥዋዕኒ
                  ፡ ወኵሉ ፡ ንዋዩ ፡ ወቀብኦሙ ፡ ወቀደሶሙ ፤

translations.lxx: And it came to pass in the day in which Moses finished the setting-up of the tabernacle, that he anointed it, and consecrated it, and all its furniture, and the altar and all its furniture, he even anointed them, and consecrated them.
translations.kjv: And it came to pass on the day that Moses had fully set up the tabernacle, and had anointed it, and sanctified it, and all the instruments thereof, both the altar and all the vessels thereof, and had anointed them, and sanctified them;

verses.geez:
ወአምጽኡ ፡ መላእክተ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ዐሠርቱ ፡ ወክልኤቱ ፡ መላእክት ፡ ዘዘ ፡ አብያተ ፡ አበዊሆሙ ፡ እሉ ፡ ውእቶሙ ፡
                  መላእክተ ፡ ነገዶሙ ፡ እለ ፡ ተሠይሙ ፡ ዲበ ፡ ምስፍናሆሙ ።

translations.lxx: And the princes of Israel brought gifts, twelve princes of their fathers' houses: these were the heads of tribes, these are they that presided over the numbering.
translations.kjv: That the princes of Israel, heads of the house of their fathers, who were the princes of the tribes, and were over them that were numbered, offered:

verses.geez:
ወአምጽኡ ፡ ቍርባኖሙ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፤ ስድስቱ ፡ ሰረገላት ፡ ሠናያን ፡ ወዐሠርቱ ፡ ወክልኤቱ ፡ አልህምት ፡
                  ለለአሐዱ ፡ ሰረገላ ፡ በበክልኤቱ ፡ አልህምቱ ፡ ዘሰረገላት ፡ እምነ ፡ ክልኤቱ ፡ ክልኤቱ ፡ መላእክት ፡ ወሶር ፡ እምኀበ ፡
                  አሐዱ ፡ አሐዱ ፤ ወአምጽኡ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ ደብተራ ።

translations.lxx: And they brought their gift before the Lord, six covered waggons, and twelve oxen; a waggon from two princes, and a calf from each: and they brought them before the tabernacle.
translations.kjv: And they brought their offering before the LORD, six covered wagons, and twelve oxen; a wagon for two of the princes, and for each one an ox: and they brought them before the tabernacle.

verses.geez: ወነበቦ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ወይቤሎ ፤

translations.lxx: And the Lord spoke to Moses, saying,
translations.kjv: And the LORD spake unto Moses, saying,

verses.geez:
ንሣእ ፡ እምኔሆሙ ፡ ወይኩን ፡ ዘይትቀነይ ፡ ለምግባረ ፡ ደብተራ ፡ ዘመርጡል ፡ ወሀቦሙ ፡ ለሌዋውያን ፡ ለለ፩እምኔሆሙ ፡
                  በከመ ፡ ምግባሮሙ ።

translations.lxx: Take of them, and they shall be for the works of the services of the tabernacle of witness: and thou shalt give them to the Levites, to each one according to his ministration.
translations.kjv: Take it of them, that they may be to do the service of the tabernacle of the congregation; and thou shalt give them unto the Levites, to every man according to his service.

verses.geez: ወነሥአ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ውእተ ፡ ሰረገላ ፡ ወአልህምቶኒ ፡ ወወሀቦሙ ፡ ለሌዋውያን ።

translations.lxx: And Moses took the waggons and the oxen, and gave them to the Levites.
translations.kjv: And Moses took the wagons and the oxen, and gave them unto the Levites.

verses.geez: ፪ሰረገላተ ፡ ወ፬አልህምተ ፡ ወሀቦሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ ጌድሶን ፡ በአምጣነ ፡ ምግባሮሙ ።

translations.lxx: And he gave two waggons and four oxen to the sons of Gedson, according to their ministrations.
translations.kjv: Two wagons and four oxen he gave unto the sons of Gershon, according to their service:

verses.geez:
ወ፬ሰረገላተ ፡ ወ፰አልህምተ ፡ ወሀቦሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ ሜራሪ ፡ በአምጣነ ፡ ምግባሮሙ ፡ ወላዕለ ፡ ይታመር ፡ ወልደ ፡ አሮን
                  ፡ ካህን ፡ እሙንቱ ።

translations.lxx: And four waggons and eight oxen he gave to the sons of Merari according to their ministrations, by Ithamar the son of Aaron the priest.
translations.kjv: And four wagons and eight oxen he gave unto the sons of Merari, according unto their service, under the hand of Ithamar the son of Aaron the priest.

verses.geez: ወለደቂቀ ፡ ቃዓትሰ ፡ ኢወሀቦሙ ፡ እስመ ፡ ግብረ ፡ ቅድሳት ፡ ሕቢቶሙ ፡ ወበመትከፍቶሙ ፡ ይጸውርዎ ።

translations.lxx: But to the sons of Caath he gave them not, because they have the ministrations of the sacred things: they shall bear them on their shoulders.
translations.kjv: But unto the sons of Kohath he gave none: because the service of the sanctuary belonging unto them was that they should bear upon their shoulders.

verses.geez:
ወአምጽኡ ፡ መላእክት ፡ ለመድቅሐ ፡ ምሥዋዕ ፡ በዕለት ፡ እንተ ፡ ባቲ ፡ ቀብአ ፡ አምጽኡ ፡ መላእክት ፡ ቍርባኖሙ ፡
                  ቅድመ ፡ ምሥዋዕ ።

translations.lxx: And the rulers brought gifts for the dedication of the altar, in the day in which he anointed it, and the rulers brought their gifts before the altar.
translations.kjv: And the princes offered for dedicating of the altar in the day that it was anointed, even the princes offered their offering before the altar.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ አሐዱ ፡ አሐዱ ፡ መልአክ ፡ ለለ ፡ ዕለቱ ፡ ያብእ ፡ ቍርባኖ ፡ መልአክ ፡ በበ ፡
                  ዕለቶሙ ፡ ለመድቅሐ ፡ ምሥዋዕ ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord said to Moses, One chief each day, they shall offer their gifts a chief each day for the dedication of the altar.
translations.kjv: And the LORD said unto Moses, They shall offer their offering, each prince on his day, for the dedicating of the altar.

verses.geez: ወዘያበውእ ፡ በቀዳሚት ፡ ዕለት ፡ ቍርባኖ ፡ ነአሶን ፡ ወልደ ፡ አሚናዳብ ፡ መልአኮሙ ፡ ለነገደ ፡ ይሁዳ ።

translations.lxx: And he that offered his gift on the first day, was Naasson the son of Aminadab, prince of the tribe of Juda.
translations.kjv: And he that offered his offering the first day was Nahshon the son of Amminadab, of the tribe of Judah:

verses.geez:
ወአብአ ፡ ቍርባኖ ፤ መጽብሕ ፡ ዘብሩር ፡ አሐዱ ፡ ዘምእተ ፡ ወሠላሳ ፡ ሐሳቡ ፡ ወአሐዱ ፡ ፍያል ፡ ዘብሩር ፡ ዘሰብዓ
                  ፡ በሰቅሎን ፡ ውእቱ ፡ በሰቅል ፡ ዘቅዱስ ፡ ወክልኤሆሙ ፡ ምሉኣን ፡ ስንዳሌ ፡ ዘግቡር ፡ በቅብእ ፡ ለ[መሥዋዕት] ።

translations.lxx: And he brought his gift, one silver charger of a hundred and thirty shekels was its weight, one silver bowl, of seventy shekels according to the holy shekel; both full of fine flour kneaded with oil for a meat-offering.
translations.kjv: And his offering was one silver charger, the weight thereof was an hundred and thirty shekels, one silver bowl of seventy shekels, after the shekel of the sanctuary; both of them were full of fine flour mingled with oil for a meat offering:

verses.geez: ወጻሕል ፡ አሐዱ ፡ ዘዐሥሩ ፡ ወርቁ ፡ ወምሉእ ፡ ዕጣ[ነ] ።

translations.lxx: One golden censer of ten shekels full of incense.
translations.kjv: One spoon of ten shekels of gold, full of incense:

verses.geez:
ላህም ፡ አሐዱ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ አልህምት ፡ [ወበግዕ ፡] ኣሐዱ ፡ [ወማሕስአ ፡ በግዕ ፡ አሐዱ ፡] ዘዓመት ፡ ለመሥዋዕት
                  ።

translations.lxx: One calf of the herd, one ram, one he-lamb of a year old for a whole-burnt-offering;
translations.kjv: One young bullock, one ram, one lamb of the first year, for a burnt offering:

verses.geez: ወሐርጌ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ አጣሊ ፡ አሐዱ ፡ በእንተ ፡ ኀጢአት ።

translations.lxx: and one kid of the goats for a sin-offering.
translations.kjv: One kid of the goats for a sin offering:

verses.geez:
ወለመሥዋዕተ ፡ መድኀኒት ፡ ክልኤ ፡ ዕጐልት ፡ ወኀምስቱ ፡ አባግዕ ፡ ወኀምስቱ ፡ አጣሊ ፡ ወ፭አባግዕ ፡ አንስት ፡ ዘዘ
                  ፡ ዓመት ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ቍርባኑ ፡ ለነአሶን ፡ ወልደ ፡ አሚናዳብ ።

translations.lxx: And for a sacrifice of peace-offering, two heifers, five rams, five he goats, five ewe-lambs of a year old: this was the gift of Naasson the son of Aminadab.
translations.kjv: And for a sacrifice of peace offerings, two oxen, five rams, five he goats, five lambs of the first year: this was the offering of Nahshon the son of Amminadab.

verses.geez: ወበሳኒት ፡ ዕለት ፡ አብአ ፡ ናተናኤል ፡ ወልደ ፡ ሶገር ፡ መልአኮሙ ፡ ለነገደ ፡ ይስካር ።

translations.lxx: On the second day Nathanael son of Sogar, the prince of the tribe of Issachar, brought his offering.
translations.kjv: On the second day Nethaneel the son of Zuar, prince of Issachar, did offer:

verses.geez:
ወአብአ ፡ ቍርባኖ ፤ መጽብኅ ፡ ዘብሩር ፡ ፩ዘ፻ወ፴ሐሳቡ ፡ ወፍያል ፡ ዘብሩር ፡ ፩ዘ፸በሰቅሎን ፡ በሰቅል ፡ ዘቅዱስ ፡
                  ወክልኤሆሙ ፡ ምሉኣን ፡ ስንዳሌ ፡ ዘግቡር ፡ በቅብእ ፡ ለመሥዋዕት ።

translations.lxx: And he brought his gift, one silver charger, its weight a hundred and thirty shekels, one silver bowl of seventy shekels according to the holy shekel; both full of fine flour kneaded with oil for a meat-offering.
translations.kjv: He offered for his offering one silver charger, the weight whereof was an hundred and thirty shekels, one silver bowl of seventy shekels, after the shekel of the sanctuary; both of them full of fine flour mingled with oil for a meat offering:

verses.geez: ወጻሕል ፡ ፩ዘ፲ወርቁ ፡ ወምሉእ ፡ ዕጣ[ነ] ።

translations.lxx: One censer of ten golden shekels, full of incense.
translations.kjv: One spoon of gold of ten shekels, full of incense:

verses.geez: ወላህም ፡ ፩እምውስተ ፡ አልህምት ፡ ወበግዕ ፡ ፩[ወማሕስአ ፡ በግዕ ፡ ፩]ዘዓመት ፡ ለመሥዋዕት ።

translations.lxx: One calf of the herd, one ram, one he-lamb of a year old for a whole-burnt-offering,
translations.kjv: One young bullock, one ram, one lamb of the first year, for a burnt offering:

verses.geez: ወሐርጌ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ አጣሊ ፡ ፩በእንተ ፡ ኀጢአት ።

translations.lxx: and one kid of the goats for a sin-offering.
translations.kjv: One kid of the goats for a sin offering:

verses.geez:
ወለመሥዋዕተ ፡ መድኀኒት ፡ ፪እጐልት ፡ ወ፭አባግዕ ፡ ወ፭አጣሊ ፡ ወ፭አባግዕ ፡ አንስት ፡ ዘዘ ፡ ዓመት ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ውእቱ
                  ፡ ቍርባኑ ፡ ለናትናኤል ፡ ወልደ ፡ ሶገር ።

translations.lxx: And for a sacrifice, a peace-offering, two heifers, five rams, five he-goats, five ewe-lambs of a year old: this was the gift of Nathanael the son of Sogar.
translations.kjv: And for a sacrifice of peace offerings, two oxen, five rams, five he goats, five lambs of the first year: this was the offering of Nethaneel the son of Zuar.

verses.geez: ወበሣልስት ፡ ዕለት ፡ አብአ ፡ መልአኮሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ ዛቡሎን ፡ [ኤልያብ ፡ ወልደ ፡ ኬሎን ፡] ቍርባኖ ።

translations.lxx: On the third day the prince of the sons of Zabulon, Eliab the son of Chælon.
translations.kjv: On the third day Eliab the son of Helon, prince of the children of Zebulun, did offer:

verses.geez:
መጽብኅ ፡ ፩ዘብሩር ፡ ዘ፻ወ፴ሐሳቡ ፡ ወፍያል ፡ ፩ዘብሩር ፡ ዘ፸በሰቅሎን ፡ በሰቅል ፡ ዘቅዱስ ፡ ወክልኤሆሙ ፡ ምሉኣን ፡
                  ስንዳሌ ፡ ዘግቡር ፡ በቅብእ ፡ ለመሥዋዕት ።

translations.lxx: He brought his gift, one silver charger, its weight a hundred and thirty shekels, one silver bowl of seventy shekels according to the holy shekel; both full of fine flour kneaded with oil for a meat-offering.
translations.kjv: His offering was one silver charger, the weight whereof was an hundred and thirty shekels, one silver bowl of seventy shekels, after the shekel of the sanctuary; both of them full of fine flour mingled with oil for a meat offering:

verses.geez: ወጻሕል ፡ ፩ዘ፲ወርቁ ፡ ወምሉእ ፡ ዕጣ[ነ] ።

translations.lxx: One golden censer of ten shekels, full of incense.
translations.kjv: One golden spoon of ten shekels, full of incense:

verses.geez: ወላህም ፡ ፩እምውስተ ፡ አልህምት ፡ ወበግዕ ፡ ፩[ወማሕስአ ፡ በግዕ ፡ ፩]ዘዓመት ፡ ለ[መሥዋዕት] ።

translations.lxx: One calf of the herd, one ram, one he-lamb of a year old for a whole-burnt-offering,
translations.kjv: One young bullock, one ram, one lamb of the first year, for a burnt offering:

verses.geez: ወሐርጌ ፡ ፩እምውስተ ፡ አጣሊ ፡ በእንተ ፡ ኀጢአት ።

translations.lxx: and one kid of the goats for a sin-offering.
translations.kjv: One kid of the goats for a sin offering:

verses.geez:
ወለመሥዋዕተ ፡ መድኀኒት ፡ ፪እጐልት ፡ ወ፭አባግዕ ፡ ወ፭አጣሊ ፡ ወ፭አባግዕ ፡ አንስት ፡ [ዘዘ ፡ ዓመት ፡] ዝንቱ ፡
                  ውእቱ ፡ ቍርባኑ ፡ ለኤልያብ ፡ ወልደ ፡ ኬሎን ።

translations.lxx: And for a sacrifice of peace-offering, two heifers, five rams, five he-goats, five ewe-lambs of a year old: this was the gift of Eliab the son of Chælon.
translations.kjv: And for a sacrifice of peace offerings, two oxen, five rams, five he goats, five lambs of the first year: this was the offering of Eliab the son of Helon.

verses.geez: ወበራብዕት ፡ ዕለት ፡ አብአ ፡ መልአኮሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ ሮቤል ፡ ኤሊሱር ፡ ወልደ ፡ ሴድዩር ፡ ቍርባኖ ።

translations.lxx: On the fourth day Elisur the son of Sediur, the prince of the children of Ruben.
translations.kjv: On the fourth day Elizur the son of Shedeur, prince of the children of Reuben, did offer:

verses.geez:
መጽብሕ ፡ ዘብሩር ፡ ፩ዘ፻ወ፴ሐሳቡ ፡ ወፍያል ፡ ዘብሩር ፡ ፩ዘ፸በሰቅሎን ፡ በሰቅል ፡ ዘቅዱስ ፡ ወክልኤሆሙ ፡ ምሉኣን ፡
                  ስንዳሌ ፡ ዘግቡር ፡ በቅብእ ፡ ለመሥዋዕት ።

translations.lxx: He brought his gift, one silver charger, its weight a hundred and thirty shekels, one silver bowl of seventy shekels according to the holy shekel; both full of fine flour kneaded with oil for a meat-offering.
translations.kjv: His offering was one silver charger of the weight of an hundred and thirty shekels, one silver bowl of seventy shekels, after the shekel of the sanctuary; both of them full of fine flour mingled with oil for a meat offering:

verses.geez: ወጻሕል ፡ ፩ዘ፲ወርቁ ፡ ወምሉእ ፡ ዕጣ[ነ] ።

translations.lxx: One golden censer of ten shekels full of incense.
translations.kjv: One golden spoon of ten shekels, full of incense:

verses.geez: ወላህም ፡ ፩እምውስተ ፡ አልህምት ፡ ወበግዕ፩[ወማሕስአ ፡ በግዕ ፡ ፩]ዘዓመት ፡ ለመሥዋዕት ።

translations.lxx: One calf of the herd, one ram, one he-lamb of a year old for a whole-burnt-offering,
translations.kjv: One young bullock, one ram, one lamb of the first year, for a burnt offering:

verses.geez: ወሐርጌ ፡ ፩እምውስተ ፡ አጣሊ ፡ በእንተ ፡ ኀጢአት ።

translations.lxx: and one kid of the goats for a sin-offering.
translations.kjv: One kid of the goats for a sin offering:

verses.geez:
ወለመሥዋዕተ ፡ መድኀኒት ፡ ፪እጐልት ፡ ወ፭አባግዕ ፡ ወ፭አጣሊ ፡ ወ፭አባግዕ ፡ አንስት ፡ [ዘዘ ፡ ዓመት ፡] ዝንቱ ፡
                  ውእቱ ፡ ቍርባኑ ፡ ለኤሊሱር ፡ ወልደ ፡ ሴድዩር ።

translations.lxx: And for a sacrifice of peace-offering, two heifers, five rams, five he-goats, five ewe-lambs of a year old: this was the gift of Elisur the son of Sediur.
translations.kjv: And for a sacrifice of peace offerings, two oxen, five rams, five he goats, five lambs of the first year: this was the offering of Elizur the son of Shedeur.

verses.geez: ወበኃምስት ፡ ዕለት ፡ አብአ ፡ መልአኮሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ ስምዖን ፡ ሰላሚዬል ፡ ወልደ ፡ ሱሪስዴ ፡ ቍርባኖ ።

translations.lxx: On the fifth day the prince of the children of Symeon, Salamiel the son of Surisadai.
translations.kjv: On the fifth day Shelumiel the son of Zurishaddai, prince of the children of Simeon, did offer:

verses.geez:
መጽብኅ ፡ ዘብሩር ፡ ፩ዘ፻ወ፴ሐሳቡ ፡ ወፍያል ፡ ዘብሩር ፡ ፩ዘ፸በሰቅሎን ፡ በሰቅል ፡ ዘቅዱስ ፡ ወክልኤሆሙ ፡ ምሉኣን ፡
                  ስንዳሌ ፡ ዘግቡር ፡ በቅብእ ፡ ለመሥዋዕት ።

translations.lxx: He brought his gift, one silver charger, its weight one hundred and thirty shekels, one silver bowl of seventy shekels according to the holy shekel; both full of fine flour kneaded with oil for a meat-offering.
translations.kjv: His offering was one silver charger, the weight whereof was an hundred and thirty shekels, one silver bowl of seventy shekels, after the shekel of the sanctuary; both of them full of fine flour mingled with oil for a meat offering:

verses.geez: ወጻሕል ፡ ፩ዘ፲ወርቁ ፡ ወምሉእ ፡ ዕጣ[ነ] ።

translations.lxx: One golden censer of ten shekels, full of incense.
translations.kjv: One golden spoon of ten shekels, full of incense:

verses.geez: ወላህም ፡ ፩እምውስተ ፡ አልህምት ፡ ወበግዕ ፡ ፩[ወማሕሥአ ፡ በግዕ ፡ ፩]ዘዓመት ፡ ለመሥዋዕት ።

translations.lxx: One calf of the herd, one ram, one he-lamb of a year old for a whole-burnt-offering,
translations.kjv: One young bullock, one ram, one lamb of the first year, for a burnt offering:

verses.geez: ወሐርጌ ፡ ፩እምውስተ ፡ አጣሊ ፡ በእንተ ፡ ኀጢአት ።

translations.lxx: and one kid of the goats for a sin-offering.
translations.kjv: One kid of the goats for a sin offering:

verses.geez:
ወለመሥዋዕተ ፡ መድኀኒት ፡ ፪እጐልት ፡ ወ፭አባግዕ ፡ ወ፭አጣሊ ፡ ወ፭አባግዕ ፡ አንስት ፡ [ዘዘ ፡ ዓመት ፡] ዝንቱ ፡
                  ውእቱ ፡ ቍርባኑ ፡ ለሰላሚዬል ፡ ወልደ ፡ ሱሪስዴ ።

translations.lxx: And for a sacrifice of peace-offering, two heifers, five rams, five he-goats, five ewe-lambs of a year old: this was the gift of Salamiel the son of Surisadai.
translations.kjv: And for a sacrifice of peace offerings, two oxen, five rams, five he goats, five lambs of the first year: this was the offering of Shelumiel the son of Zurishaddai.

verses.geez: ወበሳድስት ፡ ዕለት ፡ አብአ ፡ መልአኮሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ ጋድ ፡ ኤሊሳፍ ፡ ወልደ ፡ ራጕኤል ፡ ቍርባኖ ።

translations.lxx: On the sixth day the prince of the sons of Gad, Elisaph the son of Raguel.
translations.kjv: On the sixth day Eliasaph the son of Deuel, prince of the children of Gad, offered:

verses.geez:
መጽብሕ ፡ ፩ዘብሩር ፡ ዘሐሳቡ ፡ ፻ወ፴ወፍያል ፡ ፩ዘብሩር ፡ ዘ፸በሰቅሎን ፡ በሰቅል ፡ ዘቅዱስ ፡ ወክልኤሆሙ ፡ ምሉኣን ፡
                  ስንዳሌ ፡ ዘግቡር ፡ በቅብእ ፡ ለመሥዋዕት ።

translations.lxx: He brought his gift, one silver charger, its weight a hundred and thirty shekels, one silver bowl of seventy shekels according to the holy shekel; both full of fine flour kneaded with oil for a meat offering.
translations.kjv: His offering was one silver charger of the weight of an hundred and thirty shekels, a silver bowl of seventy shekels, after the shekel of the sanctuary; both of them full of fine flour mingled with oil for a meat offering:

verses.geez: ወጻሕል ፡ ፩ዘ፲ወርቁ ፡ ወምሉእ ፡ ዕጣነ ።

translations.lxx: One golden censer of ten shekels, full of incense.
translations.kjv: One golden spoon of ten shekels, full of incense:

verses.geez: ወላህም ፡ ፩እምውስተ ፡ አልህምት ፡ ወበግዕ ፡ ፩[ወማሕሥአ ፡ በግዕ ፡ ፩]ዘዓመት ፡ ለመሥዋዕት ።

translations.lxx: One calf of the herd, one ram, one he-lamb of a year old for a whole-burnt-offering,
translations.kjv: One young bullock, one ram, one lamb of the first year, for a burnt offering:

verses.geez: ወሐርጌ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ አጣሊ ፡ ፩በእንተ ፡ ኀጢአት ።

translations.lxx: and one kid of the goats for a sin-offering.
translations.kjv: One kid of the goats for a sin offering:

verses.geez:
ወለመሥዋዕተ ፡ መድኀኒትኒ ፡ ፪እጐልት ፡ ወ፭አባግዕ ፡ ወ፭አጣሊ ፡ ወ፭አባግዕ ፡ አንስት ፡ ዘዘ ፡ ዓመት ፡ ዝንቱ ፡
                  ውእቱ ፡ ቍርባኑ ፡ ለኤሊሳፍ ፡ ወልደ ፡ ራጕኤል ።

translations.lxx: And for a sacrifice of peace-offering, two heifers, five rams, five he-goats, five ewe-lambs of a year old: this was the gift of Elisaph the son of Raguel.
translations.kjv: And for a sacrifice of peace offerings, two oxen, five rams, five he goats, five lambs of the first year: this was the offering of Eliasaph the son of Deuel.

verses.geez: ወበሳብዕት ፡ ዕለት ፡ አብአ ፡ መልአኮሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ ኤፍሬም ፡ ኤሊሳማ ፡ ወልደ ፡ ኤሚዩድ ፡ ቍርባኖ ።

translations.lxx: On the seventh day the prince of the sons of Ephraim, Elisama the son of Emiud.
translations.kjv: On the seventh day Elishama the son of Ammihud, prince of the children of Ephraim, offered:

verses.geez:
መጽብሕ ፡ ፩ዘብሩር ፡ ዘ፻ወ፴ሐሳቡ ፡ ወፍያል ፡ ፩ዘብሩር ፡ ዘ፸በሰቅሎን ፡ በሰቅል ፡ ዘቅዱስ ፡ ወክልኤሆሙ ፡ ምሉኣን ፡
                  ስንዳሌ ፡ ዘግቡር ፡ በቅብእ ፡ ለመሥዋዕት ።

translations.lxx: He brought his gift, one silver charger, its weight was a hundred and thirty shekels, one silver bowl of seventy shekels according to the holy shekel; both full of fine flour kneaded with oil for a meat-offering.
translations.kjv: His offering was one silver charger, the weight whereof was an hundred and thirty shekels, one silver bowl of seventy shekels, after the shekel of the sanctuary; both of them full of fine flour mingled with oil for a meat offering:

verses.geez: ወጻሕል ፡ ፩ዘ፲ወርቁ ፡ ወምሉእ ፡ ዕጣነ ።

translations.lxx: One golden censer of ten shekels, full of incense.
translations.kjv: One golden spoon of ten shekels, full of incense:

verses.geez: ወላህም ፡ ፩እምውስተ ፡ አልህምት ፡ ወበግዕ ፡ ፩[ወማሕስአ ፡ በግዕ ፡ ፩]ዘዓመት ፡ ለመሥዋዕት ።

translations.lxx: One calf of the herd, one ram, one he-lamb of a year old for a whole-burnt-offering,
translations.kjv: One young bullock, one ram, one lamb of the first year, for a burnt offering:

verses.geez: ወሐርጌ ፡ ፩እምውስተ ፡ አጣሊ ፡ በእንተ ፡ ኀጢአት ።

translations.lxx: and one kid of the goats for a sin-offering.
translations.kjv: One kid of the goats for a sin offering:

verses.geez:
ወለመሥዋዕተ ፡ መድኀኒት ፡ ክልኤ ፡ እጐልት ፡ ወ፭አባግዕ ፡ ወ፭አጣሊ ፡ ወ፭አባግዕ ፡ አንስት ፡ [ዘዘ ፡ ዓመት ፡]
                  ዝንቱ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ቍርባኑ ፡ ለኤሊሰማ ፡ ወልደ ፡ ኤምዩድ ።

translations.lxx: And for a sacrifice of peace-offering, two heifers, five rams, five he-goats, five ewe-lambs of a year old: this was the gift of Elisama the son of Emiud.
translations.kjv: And for a sacrifice of peace offerings, two oxen, five rams, five he goats, five lambs of the first year: this was the offering of Elishama the son of Ammihud.

verses.geez: ወበሳምንት ፡ ዕለት ፡ አብአ ፡ መልአኮሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ መናሴ ፡ ገማሊዬል ፡ ወልደ ፡ ፈዳሱር ፡ ቍርባኖ ።

translations.lxx: On the eighth day the prince of the sons of Manasse, Gamaliel the son of Phadassur.
translations.kjv: On the eighth day offered Gamaliel the son of Pedahzur, prince of the children of Manasseh:

verses.geez:
መጽብሕ ፡ ፩ዘብሩር ፡ ዘ፻ወ፴ሐሳቡ ፡ ወፍያል ፡ ፩ዘብሩር ፡ ዘ፸በሰቅሎን ፡ በሰቅል ፡ ዘቅዱስ ፡ ወክልኤሆሙ ፡ ምሉኣን ፡
                  ስንዳሌ ፡ ዘግቡር ፡ በቅብእ ፡ ለመሥዋዕት ።

translations.lxx: He brought his gift, one silver charger, its weight one hundred and thirty shekels, one silver bowl of seventy shekels according to the holy shekel; both full of fine flour mingled with oil for a meat-offering.
translations.kjv: His offering was one silver charger of the weight of an hundred and thirty shekels, one silver bowl of seventy shekels, after the shekel of the sanctuary; both of them full of fine flour mingled with oil for a meat offering:

verses.geez: ወጻሕል ፡ ፩ዘ፲ወርቁ ፡ ወምሉእ ፡ ዕጣነ ።

translations.lxx: One golden censer of ten shekels, full of incense.
translations.kjv: One golden spoon of ten shekels, full of incense:

verses.geez: ወላህም ፡ ፩እምውስተ ፡ አልህምት ፡ ወበግዕ ፡ ፩ወማሕስእ ፡ ፩ዘበግዕ ፡ ዘዓመት ፡ ለመሥዋዕት ።

translations.lxx: One calf of the herd, one ram, one he-lamb of a year old for a whole-burnt-offering,
translations.kjv: One young bullock, one ram, one lamb of the first year, for a burnt offering:

verses.geez: ወሐርጌ ፡ ፩እምውስተ ፡ አጣሊ ፡ በእንተ ፡ ኀጢአት ።

translations.lxx: and one kid of the goats for a sin-offering.
translations.kjv: One kid of the goats for a sin offering:

verses.geez:
ወለመሥዋዕተ ፡ መድኀኒት ፡ ፪እጐልት ፡ ወ፭አባግዕ ፡ ወ፭አጣሊ ፡ ወ፭አባግዕ ፡ አንስት ፡ ዘዘ ፡ ዓመት ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ውእቱ
                  ፡ ቍርባኑ ፡ ለገማልዬል ፡ ወልደ ፡ ፈዳሱር ።

translations.lxx: And for a sacrifice of peace-offering two heifers, five rams, five he-goats, five ewe-lambs of a year old: this was the gift of Gamaliel the son of Phadassur.
translations.kjv: And for a sacrifice of peace offerings, two oxen, five rams, five he goats, five lambs of the first year: this was the offering of Gamaliel the son of Pedahzur.

verses.geez: ወበታስዕት ፡ ዕለት ፡ አብአ ፡ መልአኮሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ ብንያሚ ፡ አቢዳን ፡ ወልደ ፡ ጋድዮን ፡ ቍርባኖ ።

translations.lxx: On the ninth day the prince of the sons of Benjamin, Abidan the son of Gadeoni.
translations.kjv: On the ninth day Abidan the son of Gideoni, prince of the children of Benjamin, offered:

verses.geez:
መጽብሕ ፡ ፩ዘብሩር ፡ ዘ፻ወ፴ሐሳቡ ፡ ወፍያል ፡ ፩ዘብሩር ፡ ዘ፸በሰቅሎን ፡ በሰቅል ፡ ዘቅዱስ ፡ ወክልኤሆሙ ፡ ምሉኣን ፡
                  ስንዳሌ ፡ ዘግቡር ፡ በቅብእ ፡ ለመሥዋዕት ።

translations.lxx: He brought his gift, one silver charger, its weight a hundred and thirty shekels, one silver bowl of seventy shekels according to the holy shekel; both full of fine flour mingled with oil for a meat-offering.
translations.kjv: His offering was one silver charger, the weight whereof was an hundred and thirty shekels, one silver bowl of seventy shekels, after the shekel of the sanctuary; both of them full of fine flour mingled with oil for a meat offering:

verses.geez: ወጻሕል ፡ ፩ዘ፲ወርቁ ፡ ወምሉእ ፡ ዕጣነ ።

translations.lxx: One golden censer of ten shekels, full of incense.
translations.kjv: One golden spoon of ten shekels, full of incense:

verses.geez: ወላህም ፡ ፩እምውስተ ፡ አልህምት ፡ ወበግዕ ፡ ፩ወማሕስአ ፡ በግዕ ፡ ፩ዘዓመት ፡ ለመሥዋዕት ።

translations.lxx: One calf of the herd, one ram, one he-lamb of a year old for a whole-burnt-offering,
translations.kjv: One young bullock, one ram, one lamb of the first year, for a burnt offering:

verses.geez: ወሐርጌ ፡ ፩እምውስተ ፡ አጣሊ ፡ በእንተ ፡ ኀጢአት ።

translations.lxx: and one kid of the goats for a sin-offering.
translations.kjv: One kid of the goats for a sin offering:

verses.geez:
ወለመሥዋዕተ ፡ መድኀኒት ፡ ፪እጐልት ፡ ወ፭አባግዕ ፡ ወ፭አጣሊ ፡ ወ፭አባግዕ ፡ አንስት ፡ [ዘዘ ፡ ዓመት ፡] ዝንቱ ፡
                  ውእቱ ፡ ቍርባኑ ፡ ለአቢዳን ፡ ወልደ ፡ ጋድዮን ።

translations.lxx: And for a sacrifice of peace-offering, two heifers, five rams, five he-goats, five ewe-lambs of a year old: this was the gift of Abidan the son of Gadeoni.
translations.kjv: And for a sacrifice of peace offerings, two oxen, five rams, five he goats, five lambs of the first year: this was the offering of Abidan the son of Gideoni.

verses.geez: ወበዓሥርት ፡ ዕለት ፡ አብአ ፡ መልአኮሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ ዳን ፡ ኣኪየዜር ፡ ወልደ ፡ አሚስዴ ፡ ቍርባኖ ።

translations.lxx: On the tenth day the prince of the sons of Dan, Achiezer the son of Amisadai.
translations.kjv: On the tenth day Ahiezer the son of Ammishaddai, prince of the children of Dan, offered:

verses.geez:
መጽብሕ ፡ ፩ዘብሩር ፡ ዘ፻ወ፴ሐሳቡ ፡ ወፍያል ፡ ፩ዘብሩር ፡ ዘ፸በሰቅሎን ፡ በሰቅል ፡ ዘቅዱስ ፡ ወክልኤሆሙ ፡ ምሉኣን ፡
                  ስንዳሌ ፡ ዘግቡር ፡ በቅብእ ፡ ለመሥዋዕት ።

translations.lxx: He brought his gift, one silver charger, its weight a hundred and thirty shekels, one silver bowl of seventy shekels according to the holy shekel; both full of fine flour kneaded with oil for a meat-offering.
translations.kjv: His offering was one silver charger, the weight whereof was an hundred and thirty shekels, one silver bowl of seventy shekels, after the shekel of the sanctuary; both of them full of fine flour mingled with oil for a meat offering:

verses.geez: ወጻሕል ፡ ፩ዘ፲ወርቁ ፡ ወምሉእ ፡ ዕጣነ ።

translations.lxx: One golden censer of ten shekels, full of incense.
translations.kjv: One golden spoon of ten shekels, full of incense:

verses.geez: ወላህም ፡ ፩እምውስተ ፡ አልህምት ፡ ወበግዕ ፡ ፩ወማሕስአ ፡ በግዕ ፡ ፩ዘዓመት ፡ ለመሥዋዕት ።

translations.lxx: One calf of the herd, one ram, one he-lamb of a year old for a whole-burnt-offering,
translations.kjv: One young bullock, one ram, one lamb of the first year, for a burnt offering:

verses.geez: ወሐርጌ ፡ ፩እምውስተ ፡ አጣሊ ፡ በእንተ ፡ ኀጢአት ።

translations.lxx: and one kid of the goats for a sin-offering.
translations.kjv: One kid of the goats for a sin offering:

verses.geez:
ወለመሥዋዕተ ፡ መድኀኒት ፡ ፪እጐልት ፡ ወ፭አባግዕ ፡ ወ፭አጣሊ ፡ ወ፭አባግዕ ፡ አንስት ፡ ዘዘዓመት ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ውእቱ ፡
                  ቍርባኑ ፡ ለአኪየዜር ፡ ወልደ ፡ አሚስዴ ።

translations.lxx: And for a sacrifice of peace-offering, two heifers, five rams, five he-goats, five ewe-lambs of a year old. This was the gift of Achiezer the son of Amisadai.
translations.kjv: And for a sacrifice of peace offerings, two oxen, five rams, five he goats, five lambs of the first year: this was the offering of Ahiezer the son of Ammishaddai.

verses.geez: ወአመ ፡ ዐሡር ፡ ወአሚር ፡ አብአ ፡ መልአኮሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ አሴር ፡ ፋጌሔል ፡ ወልደ ፡ ኤክራን ፡ ቍርባኖ ።

translations.lxx: On the eleventh day the prince of the sons of Aser, Phageel the son of Echran.
translations.kjv: On the eleventh day Pagiel the son of Ocran, prince of the children of Asher, offered:

verses.geez:
መጽብሕ ፡ ፩ዘብሩር ፡ ዘ፻ወ፴ሐሳቡ ፡ ወፍያል ፡ ፩ዘብሩር ፡ ዘ፸በሰቅሎን ፡ በሰቅል ፡ ዘቅዱስ ፡ ወክልኤሆሙ ፡ ምሉኣን ፡
                  ስንዳሌ ፡ ዘግቡር ፡ በቅብእ ፡ ለመሥዋዕት ።

translations.lxx: He brought his gift, one silver charger, its weight a hundred and thirty shekels, one silver bowl of seventy shekels according to the holy shekel; both full of fine flour mingled with oil for a meat-offering.
translations.kjv: His offering was one silver charger, the weight whereof was an hundred and thirty shekels, one silver bowl of seventy shekels, after the shekel of the sanctuary; both of them full of fine flour mingled with oil for a meat offering:

verses.geez: ወጻሕል ፡ ፩ዘ፲ወርቁ ፡ ወምሉእ ፡ ዕጣነ ።

translations.lxx: One golden censer of ten shekels, full of incense.
translations.kjv: One golden spoon of ten shekels, full of incense:

verses.geez: ወላህም ፡ ፩እምውስተ ፡ አልህምት ፡ ወበግዕ ፡ ፩ወማሕስአ ፡ በግዕ ፡ ፩ዘዓመት ፡ ለመሥዋዕት ።

translations.lxx: One calf of the herd, one ram, one he-lamb of a year old for a whole-burnt-offering,
translations.kjv: One young bullock, one ram, one lamb of the first year, for a burnt offering:

verses.geez: ወሐርጌ ፡ ፩እምውስተ ፡ አጣሊ ፡ በእንተ ፡ ኀጢአት ።

translations.lxx: and one kid of the goats for a sin-offering.
translations.kjv: One kid of the goats for a sin offering:

verses.geez:
ወለመሥዋዕተ ፡ መድኀኒት ፡ ክልኤ ፡ እጐልት ፡ ወ፭አባግዕ ፡ ወ፭አጣሊ ፡ ወ፭አባግዕ ፡ አንስት ፡ [ዘዘ ፡ ዓመት ፡]
                  ዝንቱ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ቍርባኑ ፡ ለፋጌሔል ፡ ወልደ ፡ ኤክራን ።

translations.lxx: And for a sacrifice of peace-offering, two heifers, five rams, five he-goats, five ewe-lambs of a year old: this was the gift of Phageel the son of Echran.
translations.kjv: And for a sacrifice of peace offerings, two oxen, five rams, five he goats, five lambs of the first year: this was the offering of Pagiel the son of Ocran.

verses.geez: ወአመ ፡ ዐሡሩ ፡ ወሰኑይ ፡ አብአ ፡ መልአኮሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ ንፍታሌም ፡ አኪሬ ፡ ወልደ ፡ ኤናን ፡ ቍርባኖ ።

translations.lxx: On the twelfth day the prince of the sons of Nephthali, Achire the son of Ænan.
translations.kjv: On the twelfth day Ahira the son of Enan, prince of the children of Naphtali, offered:

verses.geez:
መጽብሕ ፡ ፩ዘብሩር ፡ ዘ፻ወ፴ሐሳቡ ፡ ወፍያል ፡ ፩ዘብሩር ፡ ዘ፸በሰቅሎን ፡ በሰቅል ፡ ዘቅዱስ ፡ ወክልኤሆሙ ፡ ምሉኣን ፡
                  ስንዳሌ ፡ ዘግቡር ፡ በቅብእ ፡ ለመሥዋዕት ።

translations.lxx: He brought his gift, one silver charger, its weight a hundred and thirty shekels; one silver bowl of seventy shekels according to the holy shekel; both full of fine flour mingled with oil for a meat offering.
translations.kjv: His offering was one silver charger, the weight whereof was an hundred and thirty shekels, one silver bowl of seventy shekels, after the shekel of the sanctuary; both of them full of fine flour mingled with oil for a meat offering:

verses.geez: ወጻሕል ፡ ፩ዘ፲ወርቁ ፡ ወምሉእ ፡ ዕጣነ ።

translations.lxx: One golden censer of ten shekels, full of incense.
translations.kjv: One golden spoon of ten shekels, full of incense:

verses.geez: ወላህም ፡ ፩እምውስተ ፡ አልህምት ፡ ወበግዕ ፡ ፩ወማሕስአ ፡ በግዕ ፡ ፩ዘዓመት ፡ ለመሥዋዕት ።

translations.lxx: One calf of the herd, one ram, one he-lamb of a year old for a whole-burnt-offering,
translations.kjv: One young bullock, one ram, one lamb of the first year, for a burnt offering:

verses.geez: ወሐርጌ ፡ ፩እምውስተ ፡ አጣሊ ፡ በእንተ ፡ ኀጢአት ።

translations.lxx: and one kid of the goats for a sin-offering.
translations.kjv: One kid of the goats for a sin offering:

verses.geez:
ወለመሥዋዕተ ፡ መድኀኒት ፡ ፪እጐልት ፡ ወ፭አባግዕ ፡ ወ፭አጣሊ ፡ ወ፭አባግዕ ፡ አንስት ፡ [ዘዘ ፡ ዓመት ፡] ዝንቱ ፡
                  ውእቱ ፡ ቍርባኑ ፡ ለአኪሬ ፡ ወልደ ፡ ኤናን ።

translations.lxx: And for a sacrifice of peace-offering, two heifers, five rams, five he-goats, five ewe-lambs of a year old: this was the gift of Achire the son of Ænan.
translations.kjv: And for a sacrifice of peace offerings, two oxen, five rams, five he goats, five lambs of the first year: this was the offering of Ahira the son of Enan.

verses.geez:
ከመዝ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ መድቅሐ ፡ ምሥዋዕ ፡ ዘአመ ፡ ቀብኦ ፡ ዘእምኀበ ፡ መላእክቲሆሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፤ መጽብሕ ፡
                  ዐሠርቱ ፡ ወክልኤቱ ፡ ዘብሩር ፡ ወፍያል ፡ ዘብሩር ፡ ፲ወ፪ወጻኅል ፡ ዘወርቅ ፡ ፲ወ፪ ።

translations.lxx: This was the dedication of the altar in the day in which Moses anointed it, by the princes of the sons of Israel; twelve silver chargers, twelve silver bowls, twelve golden censers:
translations.kjv: This was the dedication of the altar, in the day when it was anointed, by the princes of Israel: twelve chargers of silver, twelve silver bowls, twelve spoons of gold:

verses.geez:
ወለለ ፡ ፩መጽብኅ ፡ ፻ወ፴በሰቅሎን ፡ ወ፸በሰቅሎን ፡ ለለ፩ፍያል ፡ ወኵሉ ፡ ብሩሩ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ንዋይ ፡ ዕሥራ ፡ ምእት
                  ፡ ወአርባዕቱ ፡ ምእት ፡ ሰቅል ፡ በሰቅሎ ፡ ዘቅዱስ ።

translations.lxx: each charger of a hundred and thirty shekels, and each bowl of seventy shekels: all the silver of the vessels was two thousand four hundred shekels, the shekels according to the holy shekel.
translations.kjv: Each charger of silver weighing an hundred and thirty shekels, each bowl seventy: all the silver vessels weighed two thousand and four hundred shekels, after the shekel of the sanctuary:

verses.geez:
ወዐሠርቱ ፡ ወክልኤቱ ፡ አጽሕልት ፡ ዘወርቅ ፡ እለ ፡ ምሉኣን ፡ ዕጣነ ፡ ወኵሉ ፡ ወርቆሙ ፡ ለውእቶሙ ፡ አጽሕልት ፡
                  ምእት ፡ ወዕሥራ ፡ ወርቆሙ ።

translations.lxx: Twelve golden censers full of incense: all the gold of the shekels, a hundred and twenty shekels.
translations.kjv: The golden spoons were twelve, full of incense, weighing ten shekels apiece, after the shekel of the sanctuary: all the gold of the spoons was an hundred and twenty shekels.

verses.geez:
ወኵሉ ፡ አልህምት ፡ ዘመሥዋዕት ፡ ፲ወ፪አልህምት ፡ ወአባግዕ ፡ ፲ወ፪ወማሕስአ ፡ አባግዕ ፡ ፲ወ፪ዘዘ ፡ ዓመት ፡
                  ለመሥዋዕትኒ ፡ ወለሞጻሕትኒ ፡ ወ፲ወ፪ሐራጊት ፡ እምውስተ ፡ አጣሊ ፡ በእንተ ፡ ኀጢአት ።

translations.lxx: All the cattle for whole-burnt-offerings, twelve calves, twelve rams, twelve he-lambs of a year old, and their meat-offerings, and their drink-offerings: and twelve kids of the goats for sin-offering.
translations.kjv: All the oxen for the burnt offering were twelve bullocks, the rams twelve, the lambs of the first year twelve, with their meat offering: and the kids of the goats for sin offering twelve.

verses.geez:
ወለመሥዋዕተ ፡ መድኀኒት ፡ ዕሥራ ፡ ወአርባዕቱ ፡ እጐልት ፡ ወአባግዕ ፡ ስሳ ፡ ወአጣሊ ፡ ፷ወአባግዕ ፡ አንስት ፡ ዘዘ
                  ፡ ዓመት ፡ ንጹሓት ፡ ፷ ፤ ከመዝ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ መድቅሐ ፡ ምሥዋዕ ፡ እምድኅረ ፡ ፈጸመ ፡ እደዊሁ ፡ ወእምድኅረ ፡ ቀብአ ።

translations.lxx: All the cattle for a sacrifice of peace-offering, twenty-four heifers, sixty rams, sixty he-goats of a year old, sixty ewe-lambs of a year old without blemish: this is the dedication of the altar, after that Moses consecrated Aaron, and after he anointed him.
translations.kjv: And all the oxen for the sacrifice of the peace offerings were twenty and four bullocks, the rams sixty, the he goats sixty, the lambs of the first year sixty. This was the dedication of the altar, after that it was anointed.

verses.geez:
ወሶበ ፡ ይበውእ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ደብተራ ፡ ዘመርጡል ፡ ከመ ፡ ይትናገሮ ፡ ወሰምዐ ፡ ቃለ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ እንዘ ፡
                  ይትናገሮ ፡ እምነ ፡ መልዕልተ ፡ ምሥሃል ፡ ዘዲበ ፡ ታቦት ፡ ዘመርጡል ፡ እምነ ፡ ማእከለ ፡ ክልኤቱ ፡ ኪሩብ ፡ ወይትናገር
                  ፡ ምስሌሁ ።

translations.lxx: When Moses went into the tabernacle of witness to speak to God, then he heard the voice of the Lord speaking to him from off the mercy-seat, which is upon the ark of the testimony, between the two cherubs; and he spoke to him.
translations.kjv: And when Moses was gone into the tabernacle of the congregation to speak with him, then he heard the voice of one speaking unto him from off the mercy seat that was upon the ark of testimony, from between the two cherubims: and he spake unto him.
